description: oceanpulse is the sister repo. Both repos share capabilities. This config defines which files sync between them.

auto_sync.note: Schemas share the same patterns but may differ in domain-specific tables. Sync triggers a review PR, not auto-merge.

manual_adapt.note: Same logic, different language (TS vs JS). Sync creates an issue with a diff for manual adaptation.
Same logic, different language. Sync creates an issue with a diff.
